overall.description: A third-person gameplay sequence from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character in a light blue shirt walking along a rain-slicked sidewalk beneath neon-lit buildings and an overpass at night. The character walks toward a street corner, turns around, and walks back toward the camera through the dystopian urban environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered sidewalk beneath industrial overpass with neon commercial signage

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk toward the street corner beneath the overpass, passing other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: silver sedan driving along the wet street from left to right

entered.detail: dark weathered concrete wall with vertical seams running along the left side of the sidewalk
building facade covered in bright green and cyan neon signage with foreign characters and geometric patterns
large elevated highway or monorail structure with support pillars spanning across the background
rain-slicked concrete pavement reflecting the neon lights from the surrounding buildings

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow sidewalk bordered by a dark industrial concrete wall on the left and a brightly lit neon commercial building on the right. The wet pavement reflects the cyan and green neon lights from the signage overhead. In the distance, a massive concrete overpass structure looms against the night sky, while sparse pedestrian and vehicle traffic moves through the dystopian urban corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: street corner beneath overpass with neon signage

events.description: character reaches the corner and executes a 180-degree turn to walk back toward the camera

agents.ego_description: turning around at the street corner and walking back toward the camera along the same sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Upon reaching the street corner, the character pivots 180 degrees and begins walking back toward the camera. The neon commercial building recedes into the distance on the right, while the industrial wall remains prominent on the left. The camera captures the character's approach as they walk back along the rain-slicked sidewalk, with the overpass structure still visible in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a rain-slicked urban corridor that shifts from a forward progression toward a distant overpass to a retreating view of the neon-lit street. It begins with the character walking along a narrow sidewalk, flanked by a dark industrial concrete wall and a commercial building radiating cyan and green neon light. As the character reaches the street corner, the perspective pivots 180 degrees, causing the brightly lit signage to recede into the distance. The scene then shifts to a frontal view as the character walks back toward the camera, with the wet pavement continuing to reflect the city lights. Finally, the camera captures the character's approach while the massive concrete overpass remains a looming presence in the background.
